title: Object Types, Interfaces, Aliases, and Structural Compatibility · Compiler Case: Excess Property Checks
summary: Design public service records that evolve without silently accepting misspelled, mutable, or incompatible fields. Planned artifact: Add and verify the ts excess property checks increment in an evolvable service-record contract library. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Explain fresh object literal checks and preserve validation after values pass through variables or spreads.
Predict structural assignability while identifying where extra members, methods, and variance create risk.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
